title: CurrentSession
description: Repo-local session metadata for resuming work. Stored at .agentready/session.json. UI-only state is not persisted here.

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the repository root.

repoName.description: Display name derived from the directory basename.

openedAt.description: When this repo was first opened in AgentReady.

lastAccessedAt.description: Last time the user opened or ran a check on this repo.

lastReadinessRunAt.description: When the last readiness check completed; null if never run.

latestReportPath.description: Repo-relative path to latest report, e.g. .agentready/reports/latest.json.

latestReportVerdict.description: Cached verdict from the latest report.

activeFeatureSpecId.description: UUID of the active feature-spec.json; null if no spec.

testCommand.description: Repo-local shell command used for optional test execution; null if unset.

testCommandCwd.description: Optional repo-relative working directory used when running the saved test command; null means run from the repo root.

reportHistoryCount.description: Number of timestamped reports on disk; optional cache for UI.

appVersion.description: Desktop app version that last wrote this file.
